portfolio.title: About Me
portfolio.intro: Hi, I'm Jam Balaya — a web developer based in Japan. I enjoy Shogi and Mahjong ♟️🀄
portfolio.blogDescription: My personal blog built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Bun, and Biome.
portfolio.ossDescription: I actively contribute to open-source projects including Next.js, Biome, Mise, Dev Containers, and more.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body: We respect your privacy. This site does not collect personal information beyond what is necessary for basic functionality. We may use cookies to improve your browsing experience. By using this site, you agree to our use of cookies and our handling of any data as described herein.
